name: Eagle Ridge Golf Course
about: Eagle Ridge Golf Club is a year-round golf destination featuring an 18-hole championship course and indoor Trackman simulators. Located in Northern Michigan's Huron National Forest, the club offers a complete experience with a pro shop, restaurant, and event spaces. Simulators allow for play regardless of weather, providing a way for golfers to maintain their skills during winter months.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman simulators for professional-level analysis and practice
Open year-round operation for consistent play in any weather
Comprehensive amenities including a full-service restaurant and pro shop

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service Bar & Grill with a dedicated kid's menu and regular menu offerings.
Full bar with a dedicated beer and wine menu.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art Trackman indoor golf simulators trusted by the pros.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The provided context does not specify if club rentals are available, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs when visiting the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue operates a full-service Bar & Grill, suggesting outside food and drink may not be permitted. The club offers a wide menu of food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The context does not provide a specific time estimate for playing 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly, as evidenced by the dedicated 'Kid's Menu' section under the Bar & Grill amenities.
